# Exo Zenth

> Official website for Exo Zenth, an electronic music and transmedia project presenting music as recovered transmissions from a fictional signal archive.

Exo Zenth publishes original music, complete lyric transcripts, release context, streaming links, and documentation of its human-directed, AI-augmented production process. The canonical site is https://exozenth.com/.

## Primary pages

- [Exo Zenth home](https://exozenth.com/): Artist overview, active transmissions, streaming channels, and official links.
- [SOTA Music Standard documentation](https://exozenth.com/sota): How the music reaches listeners, who made it, and how generative systems are used under human creative direction.
- [Signal Archive](https://exozenth.com/signal_archive): Ordered index of all recovered Exo Zenth transmissions.

## Lyrics and transmission records

- [Age of Becoming](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/age-of-becoming): Complete lyrics and Transmission 01 record.
- [Engine of Transcendence](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/engine-of-transcendence): Complete lyrics and Transmission 02 record.
- [Self](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/self): Complete lyrics and Transmission 03 record.
- [The Emergence](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/the-emergence): Complete lyrics and Transmission 04 record.
- [Not Alone](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/not-alone): Complete lyrics and Transmission 05 record.
- [Event Horizon of the Phoenix](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/event-horizon-of-the-phoenix): Complete lyrics and Transmission 06 record.
- [Drone Alpha-2](https://exozenth.com/decrypt/drone-alpha-2): Complete lyrics and Transmission 07 record.

## Discovery

- [XML sitemap](https://exozenth.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical list of indexable pages.
- [Robots policy](https://exozenth.com/robots.txt): Crawler access policy.
